Bundled web fonts — third-party notices
=======================================

All fonts below are licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1
(https://openfontlicense.org), which permits commercial use, bundling, and
embedding; it requires this notice/license to accompany the font files and
that the fonts are not sold on their own. The hand-written faces are assigned
per note series on the in-game paper / note lore screen.

- Shadows Into Light  shadows-into-light-400.woff2
                      (c) Kimberly Geswein. https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Shadows+Into+Light
- Gloria Hallelujah   gloria-hallelujah-400.woff2
                      (c) Kimberly Geswein. https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Gloria+Hallelujah
- Reenie Beanie       reenie-beanie-400.woff2
                      (c) James Grieshaber. https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Reenie+Beanie
